posts.content:
Assalam o Alaikum everyone ❤️

Today I am completely free in the hostel. I was thinking many people have questions in their mind but no one to ask. So I am using my biology knowledge to answer honestly. If anyone has any question about life, studies, relationships or anything, you can ask me. No judgment today, just open talk!

replies.text: Yalina baji, you are a biology student so you can explain well. If I ask something and you don't get angry, can I ask you?
Yes Riaz bhai, what is it? Why would I get angry? Biology me ye sab normal baat hai 😂
Baji the thing is I am feeling very shy to ask. I was avoiding it but please don't mind. It is about biology and also psychology.

Baji have you heard about bhagwa love trap? Hindu men easily trap our beautiful Muslim sisters even if they are dark and ugly. But our gori khubsurat behnein who look like hoor and have doodh jaisi chikni skin, they like those badsurat Hindu men. I have seen so many cases, I am in depression now. What is the solution baji? Do they have bigger penis? Because Muslim girls like them and when I see a Muslim girl with a Hindu boy, my small nunni gets hard in jalan.
Nunni khadi ho jati hai? Ek minute... what is nunni? 😂

Arre baji, that small penis which Muslim girls don't like. That's why Muslim girls are holding big Hindu lund these days. Your finger is bigger than our nunni. It is soft like a woman and stays in hibernate mode forever. It only wakes up when I see a Muslim girl with a Hindu man.
Hehehehehehe... OMG I can't stop laughing 😂😂 What kind of pagalpan is this? I am dying here. Riaz bhai aap sach mein itna serious ho ke ye sab soch rahe ho?

Hehehehe ungli se bhi chhoti? Matlab Muslim ladkon ki nunni goli jitni hoti hai aur Hindu mardon ke lund AK-47 jitne bade? Lanat hai chhoti nunni walon pe. Mann karta hai inko maar maar ke gayab kar dun 🤣🤣 Main toh abhi tak has rahi hun.

Baji mujhe rona aa raha hai. Dekha mehak ne kaise mazak bana diya. Yeh hi har Muslim ladki chahti hai aajkal – hamari chhoti mirchi ka aachar banana aur Hindu mardon ke bade kele ko chusna. I am crying baji. Meri jaan nikal rahi hai.

Hehehehe ye sab pure fantasy hai Riaz bhai. Aisa kuch nahi hota. Jitni jaldi bahar aao utna acha hai. OMG what kind of insan I am replying to? I can't even drink water because of laughing so hard. Mehak ne toh nunni mein masala daal diya jaise koi delicious recipe ho. Ab toh hasi se mera pet dukhne laga hai 😂

Exactly baji! Isiliye sochti hun hamara mulk tarakki kyun nahi karta. 1971 mein hum buri tarah hare the iski wajah thi yeh log jo Hindu mardon ke dar se pant utar ke bhag gaye the. Lanat hai chhoti nunni walon pe. India ke paas badi missile bhi hai aur bada kela bhi jo gehrai mein deep penetrate kar sakta hai. Muslim boys sirf rone ke liye bane hain 😂😂

Hehehehe kya mahaul hai yaar! Itni mazedar baat maine kabhi nahi dekhi. Riaz bhai aap toh full entertainment pakad ke baith gaye ho. Nunni hibernate mode mein aur sirf Hindu couple dekh ke jagti hai – yeh toh next level cuck science hai 🤣
Yahi haal hai Riaz bhai. Yeh Muslim ladkiyan mazak udayengi aur unki wafadari Hindu lund ke prati humse zyada hai. Isiliye yeh sab ho raha hai. Hum log sirf dekh ke rote rahenge.

Baji please don't laugh. We Muslim boys are really suffering. When I see our beautiful sisters with Hindu boys my heart breaks and my small nunni stands up in pain. What is the cure for this bhagwa love trap?

Ahmad bhai ab toh aur hasi aa rahi hai 😂😂 Cure? Simple – stop watching those videos at night and stop comparing your nunni with everyone. Girls like men who make them laugh and feel safe, not men who cry about size and trap. Confidence se kaam chalta hai, na ke measurement se.

Ahmad bhai aap bhi same team mein? 😂 Chhoti nunni brigade full force mein hai aaj. Lanat hai tum sab pe. Jab tak yeh cuck attitude rahega, Muslim ladkiyan Hindu boys ke saath hasengi aur tum log comments mein ronge. Grow up boys!
Baji I lost all my confidence after this thread. Muslim girls are making fun of our small nunni and praising big Hindu lund. I feel like a complete cuck now. What should I do?

Riaz bhai, stop calling yourself cuck and start working on yourself. Go to gym, talk to girls like a normal man, stop this nunni depression. Allah has given you so much, use your brain instead of crying over imaginary size war. 

And please... next time don't bring nunni in public chat 😂 I am still laughing. May Allah give all you boys some confidence and hidayat. Ameen.
